meaning: n.拳头,手,抓住,抓牢vt.拳打,握成拳,紧握
examples: He let fly at me with his fist.
He punched me with his fist.
He struck the table with his fist.
The action scenes are pretty terrific, mixing earthbound shoot outs and fist fights with aerial adventure.
Woodson, a 14-year veteran and seven-time Pro Bowler, was so sufficiently impressed, he fist-bumped Nicks.
